question_title: Will US existing home sales (seasonally adjusted annual rate) for March 2026 be at least 4.0 million?
summary: The NAR published March 2026 existing home sales on April 13, 2026, reporting a seasonally adjusted annual rate of 3.98 million — below the 4.0 million threshold. This is confirmed by the NAR press release, FRED series EXHOSLUSM495S, and multiple independent news sources. The question effectively resolves NO. Sales fell 3.6% month-over-month from February's revised 4.13 million, driven by lower consumer confidence and softer job growth. The 2% YES probability accounts only for extremely unlikely edge cases such as a data correction.

factors.description: NAR officially reported March 2026 existing home sales at 3.98 million SAAR on April 13, 2026 — the first publication for March 2026 data, 0.02 million below the 4.0M threshold
FRED series EXHOSLUSM495S confirms March 2026 value as 3,980,000, cross-validating the NAR report
Multiple independent news sources (Trading Economics, Haver Analytics, Inman, Eye on Housing) all report the same 3.98 million figure with no discrepancies

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.02 (2% probability of YES)**

The NAR published March 2026 existing home sales on April 13, 2026, reporting a **SAAR of 3.98 million** — below the 4.0 million threshold. This has been confirmed by:

- **NAR press release**: "3.6% decrease...seasonally adjusted annual rate of 3.98 million in March"
- **FRED series EXHOSLUSM495S**: 3,980,000 for March 2026
- **Multiple news outlets**: Trading Economics, Haver Analytics, Inman, Eye on Housing all report the same figure

The question should resolve **NO**. The 2% residual probability covers only extreme edge cases like an immediate data correction before Metaculus resolution.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will US existing home sales (seasonally adjusted annual rate) for March 2026 be at least 4.0 million?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42499)
resolution_criteria: This question resolves to yes if the National Association of Realtors reports March 2026 existing home sales at a seasonally adjusted annual rate of 4.0 million or higher in its first publication reporting March 2026, released before May 1, 2026. This question resolves to no if the first reported March 2026 SAAR is below 4.0 million. The value will be taken from NAR’s Existing-Home Sales page at https://www.nar.realtor/research-and-statistics/housing-statistics/existing-home-sales
fine_print: Use the first reported March 2026 SAAR (ignore later revisions). Use the headline “Existing-home sales” SAAR level. Candidate Sources: NAR press release linked from the Existing-Home Sales page (backup) https://www.nar.realtor/newsroom | FRED series EXHOSLUSM495S (for cross-check only) https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/EXHOSLUSM495S
